summary: The static checks CI job appears to have failed because one or more pre-commit hooks modified files that were not committed. After the final hook (`check-contextmanager-class-decorators`) completed, the prek runner issued a `git --no-pager diff --color=always` command — a pattern distinct from the routine `get_diff` calls after each hook — indicating that the working tree was left dirty and the job reported the change.
root_cause: One or more prek hooks (most likely `generate-tasksdk-datamodels` or `generate-airflowctl-datamodels`, which auto-generate model files) modified files in the working tree, causing the pre-commit/prek framework to detect uncommitted changes and fail the static-checks job.

evidence.reason: This command differs from every prior `get_diff` trace in the log, which use a plain `git diff` form. The `--no-pager --color=always` variant is the prek/pre-commit 'show what the hook changed' step, fired only when the working tree is dirty after a hook run, indicating a hook left modified files.

evidence.quote: hook_id=generate-tasksdk-datamodels ... Executing `cd /home/runner/work/airflow/airflow && /opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.10.20/x64/bin/uv run -p 3.12 --no-progress --active --group codegen --project apache-airflow-task-sdk --directory task-sdk -s dev/generate_task_sdk_models.py`
evidence.reason: This hook auto-generates model files; if the committed source diverges from the generated output, the hook will update files on disk, dirtying the working tree.

evidence.quote: hook_id=generate-airflowctl-datamodels ... Executing `cd /home/runner/work/airflow/airflow && /usr/bin/bash -c  uv run -p 3.12 --no-dev --no-progress --active --group codegen --project apache-airflow-ctl --directory airflow-ctl/ datamodel-codegen`
evidence.reason: A second code-generation hook that writes generated Python files; uncommitted drift between the OpenAPI spec and the generated datamodels would cause this hook to modify files.

suggested_fix: Run the code-generation hooks locally (`uv run -p 3.12 --no-progress --active --group codegen --project apache-airflow-task-sdk --directory task-sdk -s dev/generate_task_sdk_models.py` and the corresponding `airflow-ctl` datamodel-codegen command), then commit the updated generated files before pushing.
